mapper.select: /* InterfaceResendMapper.xml getResendTarget */ SELECT A.ifid AS ORGIFID , 0 AS RETRYCNT , B.MAXRETRY , 'E' AS STATUS , 'InterfaceResendJob' AS INSERTURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE , 'InterfaceResendJob' AS UPDATEURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE FROM INTERFACE_LOG A INNER JOIN INTERFACE_RESENDTARGET B ON A.IFNM = B.IFNM AND B.RESENDYN = 'Y' WHERE ( ( #{fromdt} = #{todt} AND A.REQDT = #{fromdt} AND A.REQTM BETWEEN #{fromtm} AND #{totm} ) OR ( #{fromdt} <> #{todt} AND ( (A.REQDT = #{fromdt} AND A.REQTM >= #{fromtm}) OR ( A.REQDT = #{todt} AND A.REQTM <= #{totm} ) ) ) ) AND A.STATUS = 'E' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM INTERFACE_RESENDLIST C WHERE C.ORGIFID = A.IFID OR C.CURIFID = A.IFID ) ORDER BY IFID

/* InterfaceResendMapper.xml getRequestDataList */ SELECT IFID AS ORGIFID , IFNM , REQDATA FROM INTERFACE_LOG WHERE IFID IN ( SELECT ORGIFID FROM INTERFACE_RESENDLIST WHERE STATUS = 'E' AND RETRYCNT < MAXRETRY )
